name: Rio Grande Valley Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a serrated grapefruit spoon or curved knife, loosen sections in the grapefruit halves, leaving them intact. Place in baking dish and set aside.
2. Mix together chicken, celery, onion and salad dressing.
3. Top each grapefruit half with 1/4 of the chicken salad.
4. Bake at 350 degrees F. for about 15 minutes until heated throughout.
5. Remove from oven.
6. Sprinkle 1 ounce cheese on each salad and a dash of paprika.
7. Return to oven to melt cheese.
8. Serve on lettuce leaves.
Microwave Instructions:
1. Place prepared grapefruit halves in glass pie plate.
2. Cook for 4 minutes.
3. Remove, add cheese and paprika topping.
4. Cook for 45 seconds more.
